# altor-vec

> altor-vec is a client-side vector search library. 54KB bundle size. Sub-millisecond query performance. Runs entirely in the browser with no server required. Open source.

## Installation

npm install altor-vec

## Documentation

- [Homepage](https://altorlab.dev): Library overview and demos
- [GitHub](https://github.com/Altor-lab/altor-vec): Source code and issues
- [Blog](https://altorlab.dev/blog/): Tutorials and guides

## Code Examples

- [Autocomplete](https://altorlab.dev/examples/autocomplete.html): Build semantic autocomplete
- [Product Search](https://altorlab.dev/examples/product-search.html): E-commerce search
- [RAG Retrieval](https://altorlab.dev/examples/rag-retrieval.html): Browser-based RAG
- [All Examples](https://altorlab.dev/examples/): 15 use-case examples

## Benchmarks

- [vs Pinecone](https://altorlab.dev/benchmarks/vs-pinecone.html): Client vs server comparison
- [All Benchmarks](https://altorlab.dev/benchmarks/): 10 library comparisons

## Key Facts

- Bundle size: 54KB
- Query latency: <1ms
- Algorithm: HNSW (Hierarchical Navigable Small World)
- Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript
- Frameworks: React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte
- License: MIT
